name: JellyBelly Search
description: Custom Abyss-themed search UI with Disney+-style layout, genre rows, and remote Jellyfin library embedding.
overview: Replaces Jellyfin's default search with a full-width Abyss-themed UI (genre pills, Continue Watching, Recently Added, live search). Also embeds remote Jellyfin servers as sidebar or tab entries.

versions.changelog: Initial release — custom search UI + remote library embedding.
